text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower is convinced her misfortune brought
about the accident at the Hanshin Racecourse
and the resulting cancellation of the Takarazuka
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet despite the upset, her desire to run in the
race and bring happiness to her fans is
unwavering.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She negotiates with the staff at the Hanshin
Racecourse, the Kyoto Racecourse, and even
Director Akikawa, in hopes of finding a way for
the race to go ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moved by her determination, all parties
cooperate with each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result, the Takarazuka Kinen is moved to the
Kyoto Racecourse.
